title: Chef Aid Non-Stick Spring Form Cake Tin, Round Cake pan with Loose Base for Easy Release, handwash, Fridge and Freezer Safe, 24.6cm x 6.8cm
features: EVERDAY USE: This non-stick, easy clean handwash recommended, round cake tin is ideal for sponges, desserts, cakes, cheesecakes and pies

EASY RELEASE WITH REMOVABLE BASE: With the safe springform mechanism moving, storing and baking cakes couldn't be any easier, the spring loaded latch and removable loose base quickly and easily releases the cake
FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE: Easy to clean, this essential cake pan can store baked goods in the fridge or freezer
NON-STICK: Remove baked cakes with ease with this quality non stick coating; Releases cakes and bakes time and time again; The non-stick is PFAS, PTFE and BPA free
DURABLE: The cake pan is made from carbon steel with steel clip, perfect size outer dimensions 24 x 6.8 cm and inner dimensions 22.5 x 6.7 cm
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
